quick_skim.title: MultiLoReFT: Decoupling Shared and Modality-Specific Subspaces in Multimodal Learning via Low-Rank Representation Fine-Tuning
quick_skim.abstract: Real-world perception and decision making are inherently multimodal, integrating complementary signals across modalities. However, training multimodal models faces two main obstacles. First, collecting large-scale, well-aligned paired multimodal datasets is often impractical, making end-to-end multimodal training difficult. Second, existing multimodal representations frequently entangle information shared across modalities with modality-specific information, hindering interpretability and control. We introduce MultiLoReFT, an efficient and scalable low-rank representation fine-tuning framework for multimodal learning with pretrained unimodal models. MultiLoReFT extends low-rank adaptation to the multimodal setting and learns interpretable projection subspaces that decouple shared and modality-specific information. Across simulated and real-world benchmarks, it produces representations that support multimodal prediction while explicitly revealing how shared and modality-specific information is distributed across modalities.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: multimodal learning method with low-rank fine-tuning
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 多模态学习的低秩微调方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 多模态学习的低秩微调方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 多模态学习的低秩微调方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes MultiLoReFT, a low-rank fine-tuning framework that decouples shared and modality-specific subspaces for multimodal learning with pretrained unimodal models, enabling efficient adaptation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对多模态训练中数据配对困难及表征纠缠的问题，提出了MultiLoReFT框架，通过低秩表示微调将共享子空间与模态特定子空间解耦。该方法扩展了低秩适应，能够高效地利用预训练单模态模型进行多模态学习，在多个多模态任务上展示了可比的性能与更好的可解释性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对多模态训练中数据配对困难及表征纠缠的问题，提出了MultiLoReFT框架，通过低秩表示微调将共享子空间与模态特定子空间解耦。该方法扩展了低秩适应，能够高效地利用预训练单模态模型进行多模态学习，在多个多模态任务上展示了可比的性能与更好的可解释性。
